name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK == 
  /\ participants \in FiniteSet
  /\ coordinator \in FiniteSet
  /\ messages \in FiniteSet
  /\ \A p \in participants: 
        /\ p \in FiniteSet
        /\ p \in messages

Init == 
  /\ participants = {}
  /\ coordinator = {}
  /\ messages = {}

Next == 
  /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  /\ messages' = messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a function from 1..N to 0..N, where 0 means free, otherwise holds philosopher number *)
(* States: a function from 1..N to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = i
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N)+1] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] /\ flag[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, size

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ queue' = Append(queue, 1)
                 /\ size' = size + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
                 /\ size' = size - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State definitions *)
Follower == state = "Follower"
Candidate == state = "Candidate"
Leader == state = "Leader"

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {"None"} \/ {"None"} \/ {"Candidate"}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = "None"
        /\ state = "Follower"

(* Transition rules *)
RequestVote == /\ state = "Follower"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor' = "Candidate"
              /\ state' = "Candidate"

VoteGranted == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ votedFor' = "Candidate"
              /\ state' = "Leader"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ VoteGranted

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransferWithRetransmission ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE
VARIABLES file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = 0

Next ==
    \/ /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
        /\ chunks = Append(chunks, SubSeq(file, 1, CHUNK_SIZE))
        /\ file = Tail(file)
        /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, chunks)
        /\ retransmit_count' = 0
    \/ /\ sent_chunks # <<>>
        /\ retransmit_count < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, Tail(sent_chunks))
        /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count + 1
    \/ /\ sent_chunks # <<>>
        /\ retransmit_count >= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
        /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSequences

VARIABLES db, txns, t

TypeOK == /\ db \in FiniteSequences
        /\ txns \in FiniteSequences

Init == /\ db = <<>>
        /\ txns = <<>>

Next == \/ /\ txns' = Append(txns, [id |-> Len(txns), state |-> "begin", readSet |-> <<>>, writeSet |-> <<>>])
        \/ /\ \E t \in txns : t.state = "begin" /\ t' = [t EXCEPT !.state = "commit"]
        \/ /\ \E t \in txns : t.state = "begin" /\ t' = [t EXCEPT !.state = "abort"]
        \/ /\ \E t \in txns : t.state = "commit" /\ t' = [t EXCEPT !.writeSet = Append(t.writeSet, [key |-> k, value |-> v])]
        \/ /\ \E t \in txns : t.state = "commit" /\ t' = [t EXCEPT !.readSet = Append(t.readSet, [key |-> k, value |-> v])]
        \/ /\ \E t \in txns : t.state = "commit" /\ t' = [t EXCEPT !.state = "abort"]
        \/ /\ \E t \in txns : t.state = "abort" /\ t' = [t EXCEPT !.state = "abort"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = Append(known, <<>>)
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, <<>>)
        /\ \E i \in 1..Len(known) :
            /\ known[i] = <<>> \/ infected[i] = <<>>
            /\ known'[i] = known[i] \/ infected[i]
            /\ infected'[i] = known[i] \/ infected[i]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = {1, 2, ..., N}
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq free

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>> ==

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ wants[2] = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == \/ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          \/ \E n, m \in Node :
              /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
